subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling of the divine Garden! I cherish the hope that thou mayest ever remain fresh and verdant through the dewdrops from the cloud of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال باغ الهی امیدوارم که همواره از رشحات ابر عنایت تر و تازه باشی و طراوت
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @bringing forth results; fruit
